existing_suite_unchanged.command: make test  # python -m unittest discover -s tests
existing_suite_unchanged.note: E2E suite is isolated under tests/e2e (no __init__.py) and runs via its own command; make test count remains 281.

fixes_applied: CI gating: added .github/workflows/ci.yml (runs `make test` + `make test-e2e` on push/PR, installs requirements) and Makefile `test-e2e`/`test-all` targets. RESOLVED.
KML export now includes the lead email in the Placemark description (lead_ingest/exports.py); e2e test strengthened to assert email in KML. RESOLVED.
fpdf2 confirmed pinned in requirements.txt (>=2.8.0); installed locally (2.8.7) to verify the real-PDF branch; CI installs via requirements; both PDF branches (real + fallback) pass. RESOLVED.

Replaced waiver placeholder policy URLs in lead_ingest/models.py with best-guess bentondrones.com URLs (privacy: /policies/privacy-policy, vision: /pages/vision-policy) + comment noting best-guess. RESOLVED (URLs need legal verification).
recommendations: Legal review: the waiver policy URLs are best-guesses -- confirm bentondrones.com has a real /policies/privacy-policy page and create a real vision-policy page (no standard Shopify path exists) before accepting real signups.
Consider bumping WAIVER_VERSION when the waiver text changes (the policy-URL edit changed WAIVER_TEXT but kept WAIVER_VERSION 2026-07-21.v1) -- a legal call.
CI is fully wired: triggers on push/PR to main+master, pip cache, fail-fast (unit before e2e), test-count gates (min 281/55), and a summary panel. Default branch is main (confirmed via git).
